summary: Implemented drag-and-drop rule reordering in the Rule Editor with explicit insert-between drop targets, visual drop-line indicator, and immediate auto-save on drop. Added drag handles to each rule row (desktop and mobile layouts), integrated drop slot logic across the full rule list, and kept existing up/down/delete controls intact.
current_status: Users can now drag a rule line and drop it between any two lines (including top and bottom) with automatic renumbering and immediate persistence to the active bot rules endpoint.
